notes: No official OpenAPI spec published by Wigal. Authored an OpenAPI 3.0.3 description from the Frog vendor documentation (frogdocs.wigal.com.gh). The adaptor itself exposes a single operation, sendSms, which POSTs to /api/v3/sms/send; the spec covers that endpoint plus closely related Frog SMS operations (OTP generate/verify, account balance, message history) that share the same API-KEY/USERNAME header auth. Request/response shapes and example values were taken from the vendor docs; error-response bodies use the shared {status,message} shape documented for each endpoint. Voice and USSD endpoints exist in the vendor docs but were omitted as out of scope for the SMS adaptor and because detailed request/response shapes were not available.
